title: On Such a Night
writer: Morley F. Cassidy, S.S. Field, John D. Klorer
actors: Grant Richards, Karen Morley, Roscoe Karns
plot: In Louisiana, gangster Ice Richmond blackmails Nicky Last, who has been trying to go straight, to take the rap for a murder charge by threatening to hurt Nicky's famous actress wife, Gail Stanley. Nicky is convicted and sentenced ...
